arts.ttl: ‘Not even a watch’: No prizes if City win Club World Cup, warns Guardiola
arts.sum: Manchester City coach says team doesn’t deserve bonus Guardiola on Rodri’s recovery: ‘We must be careful’ Pep Guardiola has stated that if Manchester City win this summer’s Club World Cup he, his players and staff do not deserve even “a watch” as a bonus given their disappointing season. The champions travel to Bournemouth for Sunday’s FA Cup quarter-final in the only other competition they can win. City are fifth in the Premier League, 22 points behind the leaders, Liverpool, were eliminated from the Champions League in February and went out of the Carabao Cup in the last 16. Continue reading...
